spam_a.description: Spams the A button a specified number of times. Useful for fast-forwarding through early-game battles where using the first attack repeatedly is the optimal strategy, or for skipping long text sequences.

times.description: Number of times to press A. Defaults to 20.

autopress_buttons.description: If true, the harness will automatically press the buttons output by the script.

spam_a.python_script:
import json

def run(input_data):
    times = input_data.get("times", 20)
    # Cap at 100 to respect the system limits for button presses
    if times > 100:
        times = 100
    print(json.dumps(["A"] * times))

run(input_data)
